name: Pumpkin Ice Cream Tarts
recipeIngredient: 8 Prebaked pastry tart shells, each 2 1/2 to 3 inches in diameter
1/2 cup Chopped walnuts or pecans (for garnish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the heavy cream, milk, brown sugar, and salt in a heavy-bottom saucepan. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat, stirring often, until the sugar has dissolved.
2. Whisk the egg yolks in a bowl until they turn lemon-yellow. Slowly whisk about 1 cup of the hot mixture into the yolks. Then whisk the yolk mixture into the hot milk mixture.
3. Continue to cook, stirring constantly, until the custard thickens enough to coat the back of a spoon. Remove from heat and cool to lukewarm.
4. Put the pumpkin puree in a bowl, and whisk about 1 cup of the warm custard into it. Whisk all the pumpkin mixture and spices into the warm custard.
5. Freeze according to manufacturer's directions.
6. To serve, scoop the ice cream into the pastry shells; top with whipped cream and nuts if desired.
Yields 8 tarts.
